description: Digit-box number input with one digit per box and auto-advance. Bound to a variable. Supports size (number of digit boxes), range bounds, and display label.
utility: Create a digit-box number input bound to a variable

arguments.name: variableName
arguments.description: Quoted variable name to bind to

alternates.syntax: n1 = inputnumber(at(3, 4), "n1", value(60), size(4), range(0, 9999), display("Enter"))
alternates.description: Digit input with bounds and label

examples.scenario: Number input with range and label
examples.expression: n1 = inputnumber(at(3, 4), "n1", value(60), size(4), range(0, 9999), display("Enter"))
age = inputnumber(at(5, 10), "age", value(25), size(2), range(1, 99), display("Age"))
